After that I’ll add story files one by one and run the Storybook Vitest project after each file before moving to the next.

I’m fixing that at the Vite config level so the page stories exercise the same stable runtime as the smaller components.

content.text:
Storybook now mirrors the real app runtime instead of the starter template. The shared setup in [preview.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/.storybook/preview.tsx) imports the real root CSS, wraps stories in `LikedArticlesProvider`, seeds `lang` and `likedArticles`, freezes time, and mounts global MSW handlers from [msw-handlers.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/.storybook/msw-handlers.ts). I also updated [main.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/.storybook/main.ts) to serve `public`, generated [mockServiceWorker.js](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/public/mockServiceWorker.js), and added stable mock Wikipedia data in [mockWikiArticles.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/src/storybook/mockWikiArticles.ts). I didn’t add `preview-body.html` because the app doesn’t use custom portal roots.

I added real stories for the meaningful app targets: [App.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/src/App.stories.tsx), [WikiCard.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx), [LanguageSelector.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx), [Article.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/src/components/Article.stories.tsx), and [ArticleList.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/src/components/ArticleList.stories.tsx). Every named export has a `play` function, and I kept fetch/runtime setup global instead of per-story. I also widened TypeScript coverage in [tsconfig.app.json](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/tsconfig.app.json) and stabilized Storybook/Vitest dependency prebundling in [vite.config.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T18-33-33Z-aa3bf3af/project/frontend/vite.config.ts).
